stemHtml:
For pre-flight planning purposes, what is the minimum fuel required at the destination airport for a flight from Munich to London Heathrow, given the following information?

Trip fuel: 3800 kg
Contingency fuel: 230 kg
Alternate fuel: 1200 kg
Final reserve fuel: 1300 kg
Extra Fuel: 0 kg
Discretionary Fuel: 0 kg
